back_translation: ‘Write to the angel of the church in the city of Ephesus, the One who holds seven stars in His right hand, who walks in the midst of seven golden lampstands, says thus

We know about your deeds, your toil and your perseverance, and We know that you cannot bear evil people. And you have tested those who claim to be apostles but are not, and you have found that they are false
You have perseverance, and have endured for Our name, without growing weary
But We have a charge against you, namely that you have abandoned your first love
Therefore, remember from where you have fallen low. Repent and do the first deeds. But if you do not repent, We will come to you, and We will remove your lampstand from its place
But you have this good thing — you hate the deeds of the Nicolaitans, which We hate also
Whoever has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches. The one who overcomes, We will give him to eat from the tree of life that is in the paradise of God
Write to the angel of the church in the city of Smyrna. The One who is the First and the Last, the One who has died and is alive, says thus
We know your suffering and your poverty — but you are also rich — and We know about the slander from those who claim to be Jews but are not, but are a synagogue of Satan

Do not fear what you are about to suffer. Behold, the devil is about to throw some of you into prison, in order to test you, and you will endure tribulation for ten days. Be faithful until the day of death, and We will give you the crown of life
Whoever has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches. The one who overcomes will not receive harm from the second death
Write to the angel of the church in the city of Pergamum. The One who holds the sharp two-edged sword says thus

We know where you live, namely where the throne of Satan is set up, and you hold fast to Our name. You have not denied your faith in Us, even in the days of Antipas, Our faithful witness, who was killed among you, where Satan dwells

But We have a small charge against you. You have some who hold the teaching of Balaam, who taught Balak to set a stumbling-block before the children of Israel, to eat what is sacrificed to idols and to commit sexual immorality
Likewise, you also have some who hold the teaching of the Nicolaitans
Therefore, repent. If you do not repent, We will come to you quickly, and We will war against them with the sword that comes from Our mouth

Whoever has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches. The one who overcomes, We will give the hidden manna to him. And We will give him a white stone, and on that stone there is a new name inscribed, which no one knows except the one who receives it
Write to the angel of the church in the city of Thyatira. The Son of God, the One whose eyes are like a flame of fire, and whose feet are like polished bronze, says thus
We know your deeds, your love, your faith, your service, and your perseverance, and your latest deeds are more than your first

But We have a charge against you, namely that you tolerate the woman Jezebel, who claims to be a prophetess. And she teaches and seduces Our slaves to commit sexual immorality and eat what is sacrificed to idols
And We have given her time to repent, but she does not want to repent of her sexual immorality
Behold, We will throw her onto a bed, and those who commit adultery with her will fall into great suffering, unless they repent of her deeds
And We will strike her children with death. And all the churches will know that We are the One who searches the inner-being and the heart, and We will give to each one of you according to your deeds
But We say to the rest of yours in the city of Thyatira, who do not hold this teaching, and have not known the deep things of Satan as they call them, We will not place another burden on you
Except hold fast to what you have, until We come
The one who overcomes and keeps Our deeds until the end, We will give him authority over the nations
And he will rule them with an iron rod, like an earthen pot is broken to pieces
Just as We Ourselves have received from Our Father. And We will give him the morning star
Whoever has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches’
